from source import process_batch

def test_process_batch_includes_all_items():
    input_items = [1, 2, 3, 4]
    expected = [item * 2 for item in input_items]
    result = process_batch(input_items)
    assert len(result) == len(input_items), f"Expected result length {len(input_items)}, got {len(result)} (last item was skipped)"
    assert result == expected, f"Expected doubled values {expected}, got {result}"
